member.name: T:nxm.workflow.api.workflow_item_exec_options
member.summary: options determining how to execute task/event handlers

member.name: T:nxm.workflow.api.iworkflow_item_execution_context_
member.summary: helper interface for task/event execution context

member.name: M:nxm.workflow.api.iworkflow_item_execution_context_.subscribe_to_event_source``1(System.String,``0)
member.summary: subscribe to event source (clock, file-system-watch, or wf-service-host specific etc.)

member.name: P:nxm.workflow.api.iworkflow_item_execution_context_.cancellation
member.summary: cancellation object - used in cancellable methods

member.name: P:nxm.workflow.api.iworkflow_item_execution_context_.max_execution_time
member.summary: maximal allowed execution time, thereafter auto-cancelling occurs

member.name: P:nxm.workflow.api.iworkflow_item_execution_context_.environment
member.summary: access to executor-host external environment and context

member.name: T:nxm.workflow.api.iworkflow_event_execution_context
member.summary: interface exposing event-execution context to event handler procedures

member.name: T:nxm.workflow.api.iworkflow_task_execution_context
member.summary: interface exposing task-execution context to task handler procedures

member.name: M:nxm.workflow.api.iworkflow_task_execution_context.update_task
member.summary: update task data in persistent storage

member.name: P:nxm.workflow.api.iworkflow_task_execution_context._execution_context
member.summary: task execution context (for task started in given, preset context)

member.name: P:nxm.workflow.api.iworkflow_event_subscription_context.workflow_id
member.summary: workflow ID for which event is targeted

member.name: P:nxm.workflow.api.iworkflow_event_subscription_context.workflow_event_factory
member.summary: workflow event factory - method puts prepared workflow event data into workflow engine

member.name: T:nxm.workflow.api.iworkflow_task_handler_host
member.summary: task execution control interface for system or custom manipulations note: task-handler-host MUST call release_workflow_task in Dispose()

member.name: P:nxm.workflow.api.iworkflow_task_handler_host.context
member.summary: execution context exposed to task handler

member.name: T:nxm.workflow.api.iworkflow_event_handler
member.summary: interface for communicating with physical-workflow-event handler ("client surface")

member.name: M:nxm.workflow.api.iworkflow_event_handler.on_event
member.summary: general workflow-event handler procedure - called by workflow_event_processor

member.name: M:nxm.workflow.api.iworkflow_service_client.try_get_workflow(System.String)
member.summary: just get workflow data (provides separate copy)

member.name: M:nxm.workflow.api.iworkflow_service_client.check_out_workflow_task(System.String,nxm.workflow.api.workflow_item_exec_options.eMode)
member.summary: checkout task data for exclusive operations

member.name: T:nxm.workflow.api.fpWorkFlowEventStateHandler
member.summary: single, fixed state specific workflow-event handler

member.name: M:nxm.workflow.api.iworkflow_service_client_Extensions.create_workflow_event(nxm.workflow.api.iworkflow_service_client,nxm.workflow.data.iworkflow_event)
member.summary: create and 'send' single new workflow event

member.name: M:nxm.workflow.api.workflow_event.create_cancelled_event(System.String)
member.summary: create 'cancelled' event it's only partially filled - enough to pass to service_client.create_workflow_event

member.name: T:nxm.workflow.api.WorkFlowEventHandlerForStateEventAttribute
member.summary: Attribute to mark WorkFlow Event Handler specific for state-event pair

member.name: T:nxm.workflow.api.WorkFlowEventHandlerForStateAttribute
member.summary: Attribute to mark WorkFlow Event Handler for state (and all events)

member.name: T:nxm.workflow.api.WorkFlowEventHandlerForEventAttribute
member.summary: Attribute to mark WorkFlow Event Handler for event (and all states)

member.name: M:nxm.workflow.catalogue.workflow_type_info.create_workflow_event_handler(nxm.workflow.exe.events.iworkflow_event_processor,nxm.workflow.data.iworkflow_data,nxm.workflow.data.iworkflow_event,nxm.workflow.api.workflow_item_exec_options)
member.summary: create live instance of event handler (executing 'workflow-code')

member.name: P:nxm.workflow.catalogue.workflow_type_info.get_log_storage_id
member.summary: function returns log storage ID for given workflow instance

member.name: T:nxm.workflow.catalogue.workflow_task_type_info
member.summary: catalogue information about workflow-task handler method

member.summary: determines if task handler-host should be created from one of predefined types or is custom note:in that case there is different signature of factory fpWorkFlowTaskHandlerHostFactory = iworkflow_task_handler_host factory(workflow_task_execution_context oContext);

member.summary: register workflow task type info in catalogue

member.summary: interface defining catalogue information about workflow-task handler method

member.summary: interface defining catalogue information about workflow-type

member.summary: function returns log storage ID for given workflow instance

member.summary: interface defining catalogue of workflow-type infos

member.name: F:nxm.workflow.core.nxm_workflow_consts.well_known_extension_service_type.WORKFLOW_DATA_PROVIDER
member.summary: implements workflow persistence provider create_service_instance parameters: [0] - iworkflow_service_host

member.name: F:nxm.workflow.core.nxm_workflow_consts.well_known_extension_service_type.STANDALONE_TASK_DATA_PROVIDER
member.summary: implements standalone task service persistence service create_service_instance parameters: [0] - istandalone_task_service_host

member.name: F:nxm.workflow.core.nxm_workflow_consts.well_known_extension_service_id.DEFAULT_WORKFLOW_DP
member.summary: fixed id of default workflow persistent storage service

member.name: F:nxm.workflow.core.nxm_workflow_consts.well_known_extension_service_id.DEFAULT_STANDALONE_TASK_DP
member.summary: fixed id of default standalone task data provider

member.name: M:nxm.workflow.core.nxm_workflow_core.register(nxm.workflow.catalogue.workflow_info_catalogue)
member.summary: register assembly defined workflow types in given catalogue

member.name: T:nxm.workflow.nxm_workflow_error
member.summary: error codes defined in this assembly

member.name: F:nxm.workflow.nxm_workflow_error.INFO_RESCUING_TASK
member.summary: workflow task was dispatched in 'rescue' mode

member.name: F:nxm.workflow.nxm_workflow_error.INFO_RELISTING_TASK
member.summary: workflow task was dispatched in 'normal' mode

member.name: F:nxm.workflow.nxm_workflow_error.ERROR_WORKFLOW_ID_ALREADY_EXISTS
member.summary: workflow with given ID already exists

member.name: F:nxm.workflow.nxm_workflow_error.ERROR_WORKFLOW_ID_NOT_EXISTS
member.summary: workflow with given ID doesn't exists

member.name: F:nxm.workflow.nxm_workflow_error.ERROR_MAX_RUNNING_TASK_REACHED
member.summary: maximum number of continuous running tasks reached

member.name: F:nxm.workflow.nxm_workflow_error.ERROR_MISSING_EVENT_HANDLER
member.summary: there is no event handler for given event and state in given workflow type

member.name: F:nxm.workflow.nxm_workflow_error.ERROR_NOT_SUPPORTED_RUNTIME_ENVIRONMENT_TYPE
member.summary: given runtime environment type isn't supported by workflow-service-host

member.name: T:nxm.workflow.well_known_workflow_state
member.summary: commonly used and build-in workflow states

member.name: T:nxm.workflow.well_known_workflow_event
member.summary: commonly used and build-in workflow event types

member.name: F:nxm.workflow.WFEDPC.SUBSCRIPTION_ID
member.summary: event subscription ID caused this event firing

member.name: F:nxm.workflow.WFTDPC.INPUT.MAX_EXECUTION_TIME
member.summary: optional maximal execution time, used to set 'checkout-expires' value important for interactive tasks

member.name: P:nxm.workflow.data.iworkflow_data.partition_id
member.summary: partition ID (used to separate workflows belonging to different owners but stored in same storage)

member.name: P:nxm.workflow.data.iworkflow_data.checked_out_to
member.summary: to whom (event, task) is this workflow currently checked out

member.name: P:nxm.workflow.data.iworkflow_data.checkout_expires
member.summary: check-out expiration time (after which other task/event can take over this workflow)

member.name: P:nxm.workflow.data.iworkflow_task.type
member.summary: logical workflow task type (as in catalogue)

member.name: P:nxm.workflow.data.iworkflow_task.run_at
member.summary: time when task should be run. for manually picked set by user [only listed in todo-list] _date_.Infinity

member.name: P:nxm.workflow.data.iworkflow_task.expires
member.summary: task expiration time (after which task cannot be checked-out but is considered failed)

member.name: P:nxm.workflow.data.iworkflow_task.exec_result
member.summary: task execution result null = task not finished, returns to 'idle state' otherwise goes to 'completed' state,

member.name: P:nxm.workflow.data.iworkflow_data_item.key
member.summary: logical workflow item key (unique among items of same workflow)

member.name: P:nxm.workflow.data.iworkflow_task_item.key
member.summary: logical workflow item code (unique among items of same workflow task)

member.name: P:nxm.workflow.data.workflow_data_dto.partition_id
member.summary: partition ID (used to separate workflows belonging to different owners but stored in same storage)

member.name: P:nxm.workflow.data.workflow_task_dto.run_at
member.summary: should task be run automatically by task-execution host or only listed in todo-list (UI, needs user)

member.name: P:nxm.workflow.data.workflow_task_dto.exec_result
member.summary: task execution result null = task not finished, returns to 'idle state' otherwise goes to 'completed' state,

member.name: P:nxm.workflow.data.workflow_data_item_dto.key
member.summary: logical workflow item code (unique among items of same workflow)

member.name: P:nxm.workflow.data.workflow_task_item_dto.key
member.summary: logical workflow item code (unique among items of same workflow)

member.name: T:nxm.workflow.exe.iworkflow_item_execution_host
member.summary: support interface for task/event execution hosts/handlers

member.summary: workflow ID for which event is targeted

member.summary: get workflow item by its code

member.summary: tries to check-out task without sending notifications. purposed to be used internally by cooperating services

member.name: M:nxm.workflow.exe.services.workflow_service._try_get_workflow(System.String)
member.summary: just get workflow data (provides a detached copy)

member.name: M:nxm.workflow.exe.services.workflow_service.subscribe_to_event_source``1(System.String,System.String,``0)
member.summary: subscribe to event source (clock, file-system-watch, or wf-service-host specific etc.)

member.name: M:nxm.workflow.exe.services.workflow_service._load_events_to_relaunch(nxm.system.execution.context.icall_context)
member.summary: load existing events to be handled from persistent storage

member.name: M:nxm.workflow.exe.services.workflow_service._load_tasks_to_relaunch(nxm.system.execution.context.icall_context)
member.summary: load existing tasks to be dispatched from persistent storage

member.name: M:nxm.workflow.exe.services.workflow_service._load_tasks_to_rescue(nxm.system.execution.context.icall_context)
member.summary: 'rescue' tasks being executed ('checked-out') on system failure

member.name: M:nxm.workflow.exe.services.workflow_service._load_events_to_rescue(nxm.system.execution.context.icall_context)
member.summary: 'rescue' events being executed ('checked-out') on system failure

member.name: M:nxm.workflow.exe.services.workflow_service._restart_workflows(nxm.system.execution.context.icall_context)
member.summary: emit "RESTART" event for all not finished workflows

member.name: P:nxm.workflow.exe.services.workflow_service.__workflow_event_psp
member.summary: workflow-event-psp implementation for internal use note: event-psp is private to hide it from outer world, since we also are implementing this interface

member.name: P:nxm.workflow.exe.services.workflow_service.__workflow_task_psp
member.summary: workflow-task-psp implementation for internal use note: task-psp is private to hide it from outer world, since we also are implementing this interface

member.name: T:nxm.workflow.exe.services.iworkflow_service_host
member.summary: workflow service host interface for use by internal infrastructure it support communication between workflow elements and external world

member.name: P:nxm.workflow.exe.services.iworkflow_service_host.host_app_item_fid
member.summary: host's 'application item full address' (will be used as base to create workflow's service FID)

member.name: P:nxm.workflow.exe.services.iworkflow_service_host.environment
member.summary: provides environment information (below is specification of datapaths)

member.name: P:nxm.workflow.exe.services.iworkflow_service_host.workflow_event_handler_factory
member.summary: provides factory for creating event handlers

member.name: P:nxm.workflow.exe.services.iworkflow_service_host.workflow_task_handler_factory
member.summary: provides factory for creating task handlers

member.name: P:nxm.workflow.exe.services.iworkflow_service_host.select_task_executors
member.summary: select possible task exectutors for given task

member.name: P:nxm.workflow.exe.services.iworkflow_service_host.workflow_service_log
member.summary: returns log instance for use by service (and its components) itself

member.name: M:nxm.workflow.exe.services.iworkflow_service_host.get_log_storage_for_workflow(nxm.workflow.data.iworkflow_data)
member.summary: returns log storage instance for use by particular workflow

member.name: T:nxm.workflow.exe.tasks.continuous_workflow_task_manager
member.summary: task manager for continuous tasks (executed in single step)

member.name: M:nxm.workflow.exe.tasks.continuous_workflow_task_manager.run_task(System.String)
member.summary: manually start task under TEH control

member.name: M:nxm.workflow.exe.tasks.continuous_workflow_task_manager._process_tasks(System.IDisposable)
member.summary: task processing loop starts all appropiate tasks, then sleeps until something new happens: new task arrives or it is time for next task to run

member.name: F:nxm.workflow.exe.tasks.continuous_workflow_task_manager._available_task_info_.m_dtRunAt
member.summary: time when task should be run

member.name: F:nxm.workflow.exe.tasks.continuous_workflow_task_manager.m_dictAvailableTaskInfo
member.summary: dictionary of tasks available to execution (enlisted)

member.name: T:nxm.workflow.exe.tasks.executable_task_status
member.summary: task dispatcher notification - it is used to send 'message' from task dispatcher to task execution host

member.name: M:nxm.workflow.exe.tasks.executable_task_status.serialize_public_data
member.summary: create variant-set with 'public' data only (allowed to be send to client)

member.name: P:nxm.workflow.exe.tasks.executable_task_status.run_at
member.summary: time when task should be run. for manually picked set by user [only listed in todo-list] _date_.Infinity

member.name: F:nxm.workflow.exe.tasks.executable_task_status.AWAITING
member.summary: task is awaiting to be executed

member.name: F:nxm.workflow.exe.tasks.executable_task_status.COMPLETED
member.summary: task has been completed in some way

member.name: F:nxm.workflow.exe.tasks.executable_task_status.STARTED
member.summary: notification, that someone started task execution

member.name: F:nxm.workflow.exe.tasks.executable_task_status.CANCEL
member.summary: notification, that task execution should be cancelled

member.name: M:nxm.workflow.exe.tasks.workflow_task_dispatcher._dispatch_task(nxm.workflow.exe.tasks.workflow_task_dispatcher.task_execution_request)
member.summary: tries to dispatch task with given task-id

member.name: T:nxm.workflow.exe.tasks.fpSelectTaskExecutors
member.summary: delegate to select possible task executors

member.name: T:nxm.workflow.exe.tasks.workflow_task_executor_info
member.summary: contains informations about possible task executor

member.name: P:nxm.workflow.exe.tasks.workflow_task_executor_info.actor
member.summary: actor designated to execute task null = continuous task
selects task executors by scanning settings note: possible design flaw we assume that SETTING-ACTOR is ALSO TASK-EXECUTOR
selects task executors by scanning attributes

member.name: T:nxm.workflow.exe.tasks.interactive_workflow_task_handler_host_
member.summary: interactive task handler - creates context which when released, finishes task execution

member.name: T:nxm.workflow.exe.tasks.interactive_workflow_task_manager
member.summary: task manager for interactive tasks (executed in multiple steps)

member.name: T:nxm.workflow.exe.tasks.interactive_workflow_task_start_result
member.summary: transfer object holding results informations of try_run_task

member.name: T:nxm.workflow.exe.tasks.workflow_task_execution_context
member.summary: workflow task execution context for use with task-handler hosts

member.name: M:nxm.workflow.exe.tasks.workflow_task_execution_context.update_task
member.summary: immediatelly update task data in persistent storage

member.name: P:nxm.workflow.exe.tasks.workflow_task_execution_context._execution_context
member.summary: task execution context (for task started in given, preset context)

member.name: T:nxm.workflow.exe.tasks.fpCreateWorkFlowTaskHandler
member.summary: delegate to create workflow task handler host instance

member.name: M:nxm.workflow.exe.tasks.workflow_task_execution_host_.from_catalogue(nxm.workflow.catalogue.iworkflow_task_type_info_catalogue)
member.summary: catalogue based task handler instance factory

member.name: M:nxm.workflow.exe.tasks.workflow_task_execution_host_.on_task_execution_finished(System.String)
member.summary: called when task execution finished. it removes task-handler-host from running tasks and releases reference. when last reference is released, task-handler-host will dispose, releasing task

member.name: M:nxm.workflow.exe.tasks.workflow_task_execution_host_.cancel_task(System.String)
member.summary: request task cancelling. task will dispose itself after completion

member.name: M:nxm.workflow.exe.tasks.workflow_task_execution_host_.update_task(nxm.workflow.data.iworkflow_task)
member.summary: immediatelly update task data in persistent storage

member.name: M:nxm.workflow.exe.tasks.workflow_task_execution_host_.create_workflow_task_item(nxm.workflow.data.iworkflow_task_item)
member.summary: immediatelly create task data item in persistent storage

member.name: M:nxm.workflow.exe.tasks.workflow_task_execution_host_.update_workflow_task_item(nxm.workflow.data.iworkflow_task_item)
member.summary: immediatelly update task data item in persistent storage

member.name: M:nxm.workflow.exe.tasks.workflow_task_execution_host_.delete_workflow_task_item(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: immediatelly delete task data item in persistent storage

member.name: M:nxm.workflow.exe.tasks.workflow_task_execution_host_.select_workflow_items(nxm.system.execution.context.icall_context,System.String,nxm.data.query.list.list_query_params)
member.summary: select items for given workflow with optional query tuning

member.name: M:nxm.workflow.exe.tasks.workflow_task_execution_host_.get_workflow_item_by_key(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: get workflow item by its code

member.name: M:nxm.workflow.exe.tasks.workflow_task_execution_host_.subscribe_to_event_source``1(System.String,System.String,``0)
member.summary: subscribe to event source (clock, file-system-watch, or wf-service-host specific etc.)

member.name: F:nxm.workflow.exe.tasks.workflow_task_execution_host_.m_mtdictRunningTaskInfo
member.summary: dictionary of currently 'running' task - it means having called execute and not finished yet

member.name: T:nxm.workflow.exe.tasks.workflow_task_handler_host_
member.summary: host environment for executing workflow tasks (abstract base class)

member.name: M:nxm.workflow.exe.tasks.workflow_task_handler_host_._on_cancel
member.summary: notifies this task-handler-host about cancel request task-handler-host should break its procedure ASAP

member.name: M:nxm.workflow.exe.tasks.workflow_task_handler_host_._on_finished
member.summary: notifies task-execution host that task finished and should removed from running tasks. this in turn call this task-handler-host's Dispose, which releases task in workflow

member.name: P:nxm.workflow.exe.tasks.workflow_task_handler_host_.context
member.summary: execution context exposed to task handler

member.name: F:nxm.workflow.exe.tasks.workflow_task_handler_host_.m_oContext
member.summary: execution context exposed to task handler

member.name: T:nxm.workflow.exe.tasks.sync_workflow_task_handler_host_
member.summary: host environment for synchronously executing workflow tasks

member.name: T:nxm.workflow.exe.tasks.job_workflow_task_handler_host_
member.summary: job-based, asynchronous task handler - starts job which at completion finishes task execution

member.summary: immediatelly update task data in persistent storage

member.summary: immediatelly create task data item in persistent storage

member.summary: immediatelly update task data item in persistent storage

member.summary: immediatelly delete task data item in persistent storage

member.name: M:nxm.workflow.components.workflows.workflow_event_handler__.finish_workflow(System.String)
member.summary: procedure to be called when workflow is to be finished it should clear all event-subscriptions and other runtime elements, set proper results and create post-workflow events
